review_method: academic-research-suite deep research with parallel source, model, literature, and devil-advocate audits
research_question: At matched exposure frequency, how do source diversity, expression diversity, duplication, and conflicting evidence affect the acquisition, representation, forgetting, and candidate-free access of multivalued title-artist relations?

deepseek_audit.conclusion: Major DeepSeek releases provide many final weights and substantial technical detail, but not a complete document-level corpus, sample order, end-to-end trainer, raw logs, and post-training data required for source-to-knowledge tracing.

families.name: DeepSeek LLM 7B/67B
families.suitability: checkpoint timing only; cannot attribute song knowledge to exact documents

families.name: DeepSeek R1
families.suitability: post-training behavior only; inherits V3 corpus opacity

model_candidates.name: Pythia-1B-deduped
model_candidates.optimizer_state: final public; intermediate available by request
model_candidates.strength: same data order across scales, pretokenized data and dataloader reconstruction

model_candidates.name: OLMo-1B
model_candidates.role: confirmatory natural trajectory and controlled continuation
model_candidates.strength: open data order, checkpoints, optimizer state, configs, code, and logs
model_candidates.limitation: multi-trillion-token corpus is expensive to scan

model_candidates.name: OLMo 2 1B
model_candidates.exact_order: available through original OLMo artifacts; verify every artifact link before use
model_candidates.checkpoint_interval: at least 1000 steps in OLMo format
model_candidates.strength: modern small model with open data, recipes, checkpoints, and logs
model_candidates.limitation: the convenient early-training HF trajectory is a later rerun and is not identical to the original training run

model_candidates.name: Qwen and DeepSeek families
model_candidates.role: final behavior and capability comparison only

core_literature.claim: fact QA accuracy is strongly related to the number of relevant pretraining documents; retrieval especially helps the long tail
core_literature.limitation: entity co-occurrence is not a semantic relation assertion

core_literature.claim: high-frequency incorrect co-occurrence can overpower a lower-frequency correct object
core_literature.limitation: controlled fine-tuning does not directly establish pretraining dynamics

core_literature.claim: paraphrase and sentence-order diversity improve extraction from stored synthetic biography knowledge
factual probability increases incrementally at exposures and is diluted by forgetting; duplicated data forgets faster
core_literature.limitation: injected fictional facts do not establish natural web behavior

core_literature.claim: pretraining frequency correlates strongly with linear representations of factual relations
core_literature.limitation: linear decodability is neither necessary nor sufficient for candidate-free access

core_literature.claim: influential examples and passages explicitly stating a fact are not the same retrieval target
core_literature.use: separate textual support from causal influence
core_literature.limitation: influence is not exact leave-one-out causal proof

core_literature.claim: prompt choice substantially changes measured factual knowledge
core_literature.limitation: behavioral elicitation does not locate training sources

core_literature.claim: 154 checkpoints and a reconstructable common data order enable learning-dynamics research
data, order tools, code, checkpoints, optimizer states, and logs are released for open LM science
core_literature.limitation: full corpus search is operationally expensive

core_literature.claim: a documented three-trillion-token corpus spans web, papers, code, books, social media, and encyclopedic content
core_literature.limitation: corpus availability alone does not label music relation assertions

novelty_requirements: semantic relation exposure rather than raw entity co-occurrence
natural multivalued music relations rather than synthetic single-valued triples alone
separate frequency, independent-source diversity, duplicate concentration, and conflict
exact checkpoint acquisition and forgetting trajectory
candidate-free access as primary behavior, with forced-choice only secondary
controlled continuation that tests the natural-data pattern causally
mechanistic claims only after behavior and disjoint-generalization gates
fatal_risk: A synthetic-only factorial study would look like an existing knowledge-acquisition experiment with music labels. Natural music evidence and multivalued relation structure are required for novelty.
recommended_next_step: Freeze and execute the 120-relation Pythia corpus-mapping and 12-checkpoint feasibility protocol before any new probe or intervention.
